other_observers: Mark Peterson , Bill Maynard , Duane Nelson 2 hours later.
specific_location: Lake Hasty , John Martin Reservoir , south side.
description: Heron with long legs and neck in comparison with adjacent snowy egret but about half the size of a Great Blue. Dark gray blue back and neck , white belly , in flight shows white underwing coverts and belly.Behavior: Feeding and preening along lake shoreline with Snowy Egrets . When disturbed flew to other side of lake.Call: None heardPlumage: adult
